# Spec â†” Test Traceability Matrix

**Auto-regenerated by `cargo test --test traceability` â€” do not edit by hand.**

Source of contracts: every `[C-<area>-<NNN>]` marker in [`specs/specification.md`](specification.md). Each contract carries one or more `` Pinned by `<test_fn>` `` claims naming a real `fn <test_fn>` under `src/` or `tests/`. The traceability test fails if (a) any contract has no pin, (b) any pin names a non-existent function, or (c) the matrix file disagrees with the spec â€” running `cargo test --test traceability` regenerates this file from the spec.

**Coverage:** 43 contracts, 34 unique pinning tests.

## Server runtime (`C-server-*`)

| Contract ID | Title | Pinning test(s) | Test file(s) |
|---|---|---|---|
| `C-server-001` | Deserialization errors name the offending field | `null_required_uuid_field_error_names_the_field` | `src/server/mod.rs` |
| `C-server-002` | Every error path emits the structured envelope with no exemptions inside handler bodies | `handler_body_validation_uses_structured_envelope_not_bare_invalid_params`<br>`operational_failures_route_through_tool_error_not_bare_internal_error` | `src/server/mod.rs`<br>`src/server/mod.rs` |
| `C-server-003` | `Parameters<T>` is the wrapper name on every tool's input | `parameter_bearing_tools_publish_non_empty_input_schema_properties` | `src/server/mod.rs` |
| `C-server-004` | Every walk-shaped tool's JSON output carries the four-field truncation envelope | `every_walk_tool_emits_full_truncation_envelope_in_json` | `src/server/mod.rs` |
| `C-server-005` | `move_node` propagation retry is inlined into `client.move_node` | `move_node_embeds_propagation_retry_loop` | `src/server/mod.rs` |
| `C-server-006` | Null parent_id / node_id resolves uniformly to workspace root across the tool family | `scope_resolved_label_renders_stable_strings`<br>`scope_resolved_label_two_branches_render_stable_format` | `src/server/mod.rs`<br>`src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-server-007` | Every scoped tool emits `scope_resolved` in its response | `every_scoped_tool_emits_scope_resolved_in_response` | `src/server/mod.rs` |
| `C-server-008` | `INSERT_CONTENT_TIMEOUT_MS` leaves Ă˘Â‰ÂĄ 60 s margin under `MCP_TRANSPORT_HARD_TIMEOUT_MS` | `bulk_budget_leaves_mcp_transport_margin` | `src/defaults.rs` |
| `C-server-009` | Subtree renderers + `scope_resolved_label` live in shared modules, never duplicated in the surface binaries | `no_duplicated_renderer_or_scope_label_definitions_outside_canonical_modules` | `src/server/mod.rs` |
| `C-server-010` | `create_mirror` supports `dry_run=true` for read-only resolution preview | `create_mirror_dry_run_rejects_self_mirror_without_api_call` | `src/workflows.rs` |

## Workflow orchestration (`C-wf-*`)

| Contract ID | Title | Pinning test(s) | Test file(s) |
|---|---|---|---|
| `C-wf-001` | Mirror-of-self is rejected before any API call | `create_mirror_via_convention_rejects_self_mirror_without_api_call` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-002` | `WorkflowContext::default()` signals no cancel and no deadline | `workflow_context_default_signals_no_cancel_and_no_deadline` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-003` | A deadline is correctly classified as past when now is after it | `workflow_context_deadline_is_past_when_now_is_after` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-004` | The declarative `MutationFootprint` accumulates IDs and merges via `extend()` | `mutation_footprint_records_invalidations` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-005` | `insert_content` empty payload short-circuits to `Complete { created_count: 0 }` without touching the API | `insert_content_empty_payload_is_zero_cost_complete` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-006` | `insert_content` payload above `MAX_INSERT_CONTENT_LINES` fails with `InvalidInput` | `insert_content_above_cap_returns_invalid_input` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-007` | `insert_content` pre-cancelled returns partial-success cursor at zero | `insert_content_pre_cancelled_returns_partial_zero` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-008` | `insert_content` past deadline returns partial-success cursor with `Timeout` reason | `insert_content_past_deadline_returns_partial_timeout` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-009` | Bulk-op wire strings are the public contract; case-sensitive | `bulk_op_parse_accepts_exact_wire_strings_only` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-010` | `bulk_update` tag operations require `operation_tag` before any API call | `apply_bulk_op_rejects_tag_op_without_operation_tag` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-011` | `smart_insert` rejects empty content before walking | `smart_insert_under_target_rejects_empty_content` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-012` | Indented content parser handles 2-space-per-level indentation, drops empty lines, trims whitespace | `parse_indented_content_handles_indents_and_blanks` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-013` | `create_mirror_dry_run` rejects self-mirror with `InvalidInput` before any API call | `create_mirror_dry_run_rejects_self_mirror_without_api_call` | `src/workflows.rs` |
| `C-wf-014` | `scope_resolved_label` is the single renderer for the diagnostic `scope_resolved` token; format is `"workspace_root"` for None and `"scoped:<uuid>"` for Some | `scope_resolved_label_two_branches_render_stable_format` | `src/workflows.rs` |
